Deployment.Environment: Set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production in the hosting control panel (or web.config environmentVariables) so this file is loaded and overrides appsettings.json.
Deployment.ConnectionString: Replace ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection above with the exact SQL Server connection string from your host (MonsterASP / runasp.net SQL panel). Never use Server=.; or Trusted_Connection=True on shared hosting—use Server=..., User Id, and Password from the provider.
Deployment.JwtSecretKey: Replace Jwt:SecretKey with a long random secret (32+ characters). Tokens issued with the old secret become invalid after you change it.
Deployment.DatabaseMigrations: On first deploy, ensure the SQL user can CREATE TABLE. The API runs EF migrations at startup; if the database is empty, tables are created automatically when the connection string is valid.
Deployment.HttpsAndSwagger: Public URL is HTTPS; Swagger is at /swagger. If something still fails, enable stdout logs (web.config logs folder) and read the newest stdout_*.log file.
Deployment.Optional_AzureSqlExample: If you use Azure SQL instead, typical format is: Server=tcp:YOURSERVER.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=YOURDB;User ID=YOURUSER;Password=YOURPASSWORD;Encrypt=True;
